title: Anupamaa
subTitle: Citing Anuj's trip cancellation as a sign from above, Kinjal coaxes Anupama to reconsider her decision. Later, Vanraj requests Anupama to sign the property papers.

title: Anupamaa
subTitle: Anupamaa stumbles upon Leela's distressing sobs in her room but Hasmukh skillfully deflects her concerns. Later, Leela and Hasmukh depart from the house and Anupamaa accuses Vanraj of being the cause.

title: Ninna Jothe Nanna Kathe
subTitle: After Bhoomi and Ajith tie the knot out of convenience, they strive to build a bond and draw strength from each other in tough situations.
